(B) launchd plist com.canon.own-doc-lint 신설 + tool/own_doc_lint_with_alert.sh wrapper (raw 66 trailer + raw 77 ledger). (C) proposals/hexa-weave-hive-lock-own-doc-lint-integration-2026-04-29.md forward-spec (cycle 27+ implementation, hive raw 99 가 atomic gate path). 5/5 sub-agent 모두 server-side rate-limited; 메인 thread 직접 진행.
